name: ARMCM3xxx
description: ARM 32-bit Cortex-M3 Microcontroller based device, CPU clock up to 80MHz, etc.

peripherals.name: TIMER0
peripherals.description: 32 Timer / Counter, counting up or down from different sources

children.name: CR
children.description: Control Register

fields.name: EN
fields.description: Enable

enumerated_values.name: Disable
enumerated_values.description: Timer is disabled and does not operate

enumerated_values.name: Enable
enumerated_values.description: Timer is enabled and can operate

fields.name: RST
fields.description: Reset Timer

fields.name: CNT
fields.description: Counting direction

enumerated_values.name: Count_UP
enumerated_values.description: Timer Counts UO and wraps, if no STOP condition is set

enumerated_values.name: Count_DOWN
enumerated_values.description: Timer Counts DOWN and wraps, if no STOP condition is set

enumerated_values.name: Toggle
enumerated_values.description: Timer Counts up to MAX, then DOWN to ZERO, if no STOP condition is set

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: Operation Mode

enumerated_values.name: Single_ZERO_MAX
enumerated_values.description: Timer counts to 0x00 or 0xFFFFFFFF (depending on CNT) and stops

enumerated_values.name: Single_MATCH
enumerated_values.description: Timer counts to the Value of MATCH Register and stops

enumerated_values.name: Reload_ZERO_MAX
enumerated_values.description: Timer counts to 0x00 or 0xFFFFFFFF (depending on CNT), loads the RELOAD Value and continues

enumerated_values.name: Reload_MATCH
enumerated_values.description: Timer counts to the Value of MATCH Register, loads the RELOAD Value and continues

fields.name: PSC
fields.description: Use Prescaler

fields.name: CNTSRC
fields.description: Timer / Counter Source Divider

fields.name: CAPSRC
fields.description: Timer / Counter Capture Source

fields.name: CAPEDGE
fields.description: Capture Edge, select which Edge should result in a counter increment or decrement

enumerated_values.name: RISING
enumerated_values.description: Only rising edges result in a counter increment or decrement

enumerated_values.name: FALLING
enumerated_values.description: Only falling edges  result in a counter increment or decrement

enumerated_values.name: BOTH
enumerated_values.description: Rising and falling edges result in a counter increment or decrement

fields.name: TRGEXT
fields.description: Triggers an other Peripheral

enumerated_values.name: DMA1
enumerated_values.description: DMA Controller 1 is triggered, dependant on MODE

enumerated_values.name: DMA2
enumerated_values.description: DMA Controller 2 is triggered, dependant on MODE

enumerated_values.name: UART
enumerated_values.description: UART is triggered, dependant on MODE

fields.name: RELOAD
fields.description: Select RELOAD Register n to reload Timer on condition

fields.name: IDR
fields.description: Selects, if Reload Register number is incremented, decremented or not modified

enumerated_values.name: KEEP
enumerated_values.description: Reload Register number does not change automatically

enumerated_values.name: INCREMENT
enumerated_values.description: Reload Register number is incremented on each match

enumerated_values.name: DECREMENT
enumerated_values.description: Reload Register number is decremented on each match

fields.name: S
fields.description: Starts and Stops the Timer / Counter

children.name: SR
children.description: Status Register

fields.name: RUN
fields.description: Shows if Timer is running or not

fields.name: MATCH
fields.description: Shows if the MATCH was hit

enumerated_values.name: No_Match
enumerated_values.description: The MATCH condition was not hit

fields.name: UN
fields.description: Shows if an underflow occured. This flag is sticky

enumerated_values.name: No_Underflow
enumerated_values.description: No underflow occured since last clear

enumerated_values.name: Underflow
enumerated_values.description: A minimum of one underflow occured since last clear

fields.name: OV
fields.description: Shows if an overflow occured. This flag is sticky

enumerated_values.name: No_Overflow
enumerated_values.description: No overflow occured since last clear

enumerated_values.name: Overflow_occured
enumerated_values.description: A minimum of one overflow occured since last clear

fields.name: RST
fields.description: Shows if Timer is in RESET state

enumerated_values.name: Ready
enumerated_values.description: Timer is not in RESET state and can operate

enumerated_values.name: In_Reset
enumerated_values.description: Timer is in RESET state and can not operate

fields.name: RELOAD
fields.description: Shows the currently active RELOAD Register

children.name: INT
children.description: Interrupt Register

fields.name: EN
fields.description: Interrupt Enable

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: Interrupt Mode, selects on which condition the Timer should generate an Interrupt

enumerated_values.name: Match
enumerated_values.description: Timer generates an Interrupt when the MATCH condition is hit

enumerated_values.name: Underflow
enumerated_values.description: Timer generates an Interrupt when it underflows

enumerated_values.name: Overflow
enumerated_values.description: Timer generates an Interrupt when it overflows

children.name: COUNT
children.description: The Counter Register reflects the actual Value of the Timer/Counter

children.name: MATCH
children.description: The Match Register stores the compare Value for the MATCH condition

children.name: PRESCALE_RD
children.description: The Prescale Register stores the Value for the prescaler. The cont event gets divided by this value

children.name: PRESCALE_WR
children.description: The Prescale Register stores the Value for the prescaler. The cont event gets divided by this value

children.name: RELOAD0
children.description: The Reload Register stores the Value the COUNT Register gets reloaded on a when a condition was met.

children.name: RELOAD1
children.description: The Reload Register stores the Value the COUNT Register gets reloaded on a when a condition was met.

children.name: RELOAD2
children.description: The Reload Register stores the Value the COUNT Register gets reloaded on a when a condition was met.

children.name: RELOAD3
children.description: The Reload Register stores the Value the COUNT Register gets reloaded on a when a condition was met.
